chapter_title.en: Chapter 22 – The findings (lost property) of the Al-Harram

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (7/99)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (7/99)
text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ الرَّجُلِ يَجِدُ اللُّقَطَةَ فِي الْحَرَمِ قَالَ لَا يَمَسَّهَا وَ أَمَّا أَنْتَ فَلَا بَأْسَ لِأَنَّكَ تُعَرِّفُهَا .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ismail Bin Marrar, from Yunus, from Fuzayl Bin Yasaar wo said,

‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about the man who found the lost property inside the Al-Harram. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘He should not touch it, and as for you, so there is no problem if you were to (take it and) publicise it’.
en.sarwar: 2. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ‘Isma‘il ibn Marrar from Yunus from Fudayl ibn Yasar who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about a man who finds something in al-Haram (the sacred area). He (the Imam) said, ‘He must not touch it. However, in your case it is not harmful because you define and publicize it.’”
